If you’re new to trading, I wouldn’t recommend going at it alone. Self-trading without the right understanding can be dangerous and has cost many investors their hard-earned money. It’s important to have guidance from someone experienced and dedicated to the cryptocurrency market. That’s why I highly recommend Rolando Mario.
If your “backtesting” doesn’t rely on a non-emotional computer program, then you are your own strategy.

I like how this simplifies the whole session down to that first 9:30 candle instead of overcomplicating things with a million levels. Waiting for the FVG and then the engulfing on the retrace makes way more sense than chasing the first breakout. I’ve been trying to map that opening range into overall structure with the first light beacon so I can see if the move is actually expanding in real order flow or just a fake push. The rule about not trading inside the range alone probably saves more money than most strategies.

I’ll be honest—this journey completely changed my life. I went from having almost nothing to building a home in Florida, starting with just a $3,000 account and growing it to $41,600 in only two weeks. Will this actually work? I'm going to find out with this backtest: 
- /ES 
- 3 years of data (2022, 2024, 2025) 
- Forward testing only using FX replay (no hindsight cheating) 
- 1% risk, 2R targeting
- I've been trading for 4 years so I know how to read PA really well (ICT, Volume Price Analysis, Tape reader, Bookmap orderbook reader, etc) 
^ for the purpose of this backtest, I will only be using candles (no orderflow tools) like Scarface did 

I'll drop my results in the comment replies as I go about this to let yall know how it works. Make sure to like this comment so I can find it and come back :)
